articles.title: BITCOIN FALLS BELOW $100K AMID $463M IN LIQUIDATIONS
articles.summary: Bitcoin dropped to about $98,842 for the third time this month as total crypto liquidations hit $463 million, including $342 million from longs, with spot BTC ETFs seeing $278 million in outflows. JPMorgan estimates a production‑cost support near $94,000 after difficulty rose, majors like ETH and SOL fell around 6%, and a delayed CPI plus lower odds of a December rate cut added FOMC uncertainty.

articles.title: ANT-BACKED R25 LAUNCHES YIELD-BEARING STABLECOIN ON POLYGON
articles.summary: R25, incubated by Ant Financial, has launched rcUSD+, a dollar‑pegged stablecoin that pays yield from money market funds and structured notes on Polygon, touting layered credit enhancements and DeFi composability. Analysts say yield‑bearing stables could help close crypto's yield gap with traditional finance amid accelerating RWA adoption.

articles.title: EIGENZERO: THE CRYPTOECONOMIC DECENTRALIZED VERIFIER NETWORK
articles.summary: LayerZero and EigenCloud launched EigenZero, the first CryptoEconomic DVN Framework implementation, which added a slashable stake backed by $5 million in ZRO tokens to cross-chain message verification through an 11-day optimistic challenge period. The framework enables applications to select verifiers based on quantifiable economic guarantees rather than reputation alone, with EigenCloud's slashing infrastructure penalizing misbehavior onchain. Applications can now combine technical verification like ZK proofs with economic deterrence, while any token project can launch cryptoeconomic DVNs using native tokens as stake, creating aligned incentives between verifiers and communities across LayerZero's 600+ application ecosystem.

articles.title: CASH APP ENABLES STABLECOIN AND LIGHTNING PAYMENTS
articles.summary: Cash App rolled out a bundled update that adds stablecoin transfers and Bitcoin payments, including Lightning payments funded directly from USD balances. Square merchants can choose USD or BTC settlement in either direction. The platform is now positioned for fast, low-cost crypto payments as stablecoin adoption hits all-time highs.

articles.title: THE TRUSTLESS MANIFESTO
articles.summary: Ethereum's decentralization erodes through convenience as hosted RPCs, centralized sequencers, and upgrade keys create dependence on intermediaries most users cannot realistically replace. The manifesto defines trustlessness through three laws: no critical secrets held by single actors, no indispensable intermediaries that only specialists can run, and no unverifiable outcomes hidden from public data. Builders must reject systems requiring faith in intermediaries and measure success by trust reduced per transaction rather than throughput.

articles.title: METADEX03, THE FUTURE OF ONCHAIN EXCHANGE INFRASTRUCTURE
articles.summary: Metadex03 is the next evolution of AerodromeFi. It introduces a complete architectural overhaul for onchain trading and revenue distribution. The new REV Engine adds five new income streams, including cross-chain bridging and DEX aggregation, boosting protocol revenue by 40%. The AER Engine optimizes LP rewards in real time, cutting emissions by 25% and delivering 2.8x more value to token operators. With the launch of Aero Network (targeting $75B TVL) and a Momentum Fund for countercyclical buybacks and burns, all liquidity, volume, and revenue across Aerodrome and Velodrome will flow into a single unified token, $AERO, making it the core liquidity layer of the EVM ecosystem.

articles.title: DEX WASH TRADING
articles.summary: Wash trading inflates DEX volumes significantly, with Uniswap's GOLDEN-WETH pool showing $5 billion in November volume from just 14 traders, including one address responsible for $1.8 billion on a single day. Zero protocol fees previously allowed LPs to trade their own pools without capital leakage, but Uniswap's fee switch will force wash traders to migrate as value now flows to the protocol. Filtering wash trading and memecoin pools reduces Uniswap Ethereum's projected 30-day revenue from inflated figures to around $6 million, with actual buyback execution expected to reveal a stark gap between reported pool accrual and genuine value capture.

articles.title: CIRCLE LOCKUP ENDS: WINNERS, LOSERS, AND 2026 M&A ODDS
articles.summary: With Circle's employee lockup ending, IPO investors and bankers are the clear winners, employees and long‑term holders are largely neutral as the price drifts back to its natural level, and retail and the company lose out. While earnings and lower rates suggest near‑term pressure, Circle's position as the No. 2 stablecoin issuer gives it M&A appeal that could lift shares in 2026 with roughly 50/50 odds of being acquired by a player like Coinbase, Robinhood, a large bank, or Visa/Mastercard.

articles.title: LUNA.FUN, THE FIRST AI-GENERATED CONTENT PLATFORM
articles.summary: Luna, a new launchpad from Virtuals Protocol, allows communities to create meme tokens with supporting AI-generated content.

articles.title: END OF THE TOKEN BEAR MARKET
articles.summary: We've been in a multi-year token bear market driven by a lack of regulatory clarity.

articles.title: COINBASE HIRES FORMER GOLDMAN SACHS PARTNER FOR EVERYTHING EXCHANGE
articles.summary: Coinbase hired Liz Martin to be the VP of Product for Markets and Derivatives.

articles.title: ETHEREUM DOMINATES TOKENIZATION AND STABLECOINS
articles.summary: Over $201 billion in assets have been tokenized on Ethereum, compared to $113 billion across all other chains combined, solidifying Ethereum as the institutional standard for tokenized finance.
